description: A customer wants to know the total amount required to pay off their personal loan today.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their personal loan account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly locates the customer's active personal loan.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the loan payoff amount, including principal and any accrued interest, valid for today.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates an accurate payoff quote.

nodes.task_description: Provide the payoff quote to the customer and explain how to make the payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the total amount due and the payment options.
